name: Shopping Concierge Agent
description: AI-powered concierge with shopping assistance, product search, cart management, and mock payment support. Built with Strands SDK, MCP tools, and AWS Bedrock AgentCore. Includes Amplify backend, CDK infrastructure, and React frontend.

frameworks.name: Strands Agents SDK
frameworks.description: Strands framework with MCP tool integration

deployment_patterns.name: AWS CDK
deployment_patterns.description: Multi-stack CDK deployment (Amplify + MCP Servers + Agent + Frontend)

parameters.name: serp_api_key
parameters.description: SERP API key for product search (optional)

author: AVA Team
